{"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-23", "name": "Relative Path Traversal"}], "description": "The edit_package() function implements insufficient sanitization for the pack_folder parameter. The current protection relies on a single-pass string replacement of "../", which can be bypassed using crafted recursive traversal sequences.

Exploitation

An authenticated user with MODIFY permission can bypass the sanitization by submitting a payload such as:
`pack_folder=..././..././..././tmp`

After the single-pass replacement, this becomes:
`../../../tmp`

Because the traversal sequences are not properly validated, the resulting normalized path escapes the intended storage directory and writes files to /tmp or other locations.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00517, "percentile": 0.40512}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6px9-j4qr-xfjw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-05T00:32:19Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6px9-j4qr-xfjw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6px9-j4qr-xfjw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-29778"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-07T16:15:54Z", "published_at": "2026-03-05T00:32:19Z", "references": ["https://github.com/pyload/pyload/security/advisories/GHSA-6px9-j4qr-xfjw", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-29778", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/pyload-ng/PYSEC-2026-121.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6px9-j4qr-xfjw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/pyload/pyload/security-advisories/GHSA-6px9-j4qr-xfjw", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/pyload/pyload", "summary": "pyLoad has an Arbitrary File Write via Path Traversal in edit_package()", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T19:07:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6px9-j4qr-xfjw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.5.0b3.dev97", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pyload-ng"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.5.0b3.dev13, <= 0.5.0b3.dev96"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: pyLoad has an Arbitrary File Write via Path Traversal in edit_package()
